nasb.text: And He removed the defense of Judah. In that day you depended on the weapons of the house of the forest,

esv.text: He has taken away the covering of Judah. In that day you looked to the weapons of the House of the Forest,

cnv.text: 他挪去猶大的屏障了。 到那日，你就仰望“林宮”裡的武器；

ccb.text: 犹大毫无防卫之力。 那时，你们依靠藏在林宫里的兵器。

csbs.text: 耶和华挪去了犹大的屏障。 到那日，你们指望森林宫殿里的兵器；
